title: Early Weapons
description: Early-Weapons allows new recipes and new functions for vanilla items and new weapons crafted from simple early-game materials.
body:
Early Weapons, where the goal is to enhance the early-game experience of Minecraft by introducing a range of new weapons that are immediately accessible but carefully balanced to ensure they do not overshadow the natural progression of the game. These weapons are designed to be crafted from common vanilla materials—such as wood, stone, leather, iron, gold (both finished and raw), sticks, and even flint—that players typically gather within their first few in-game days. Rather than hoarding or discarding these materials once stronger resources like diamonds and netherite are acquired, Early Weapons gives them renewed importance and practical value during the early stages of survival.

This mod is especially useful for players who find themselves in a time crunch—whether in hardcore mode, speedrunning, or just seeking more exciting combat options without needing to grind for rare ores. It empowers players with more weapon variety and utility right from the start, without breaking game balance. The weapons introduced are not overpowered or game-breaking, but instead provide niche uses, diverse combat styles, and tactical advantages suited for specific scenarios. For example, some may be faster but weaker, others slower with knockback effects, or crafted from raw materials and flimsy haha,

Early Weapons breathes new life into Minecraft’s early game by offering accessible, balanced tools of combat that respect vanilla mechanics while expanding player choice. Whether you're fending off your first night of zombies, exploring a newly generated world, or preparing for a PvP challenge, this mod helps you get battle-ready faster—without skipping the essential survival experience Minecraft is built on.
